_notes: ESP32-S3 GPIO pin multiplexing means almost any GPIO can be reassigned to I2C/SPI. Defaults below match espressif arduino-esp32 core. ADC2 (GPIO11-20) conflicts with WiFi when WiFi active; we list both ADC1+ADC2 here but warn. The DevKitC-1 ships in N8/N16/N32 flash variants and N8R2/N8R8 PSRAM variants; we use the common N8 (8MB flash, no PSRAM) baseline.
name: ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1 (N8)
special: RGB NeoPixel onboard on GPIO48 (some early units use GPIO38)
USB OTG on GPIO19 (D-) and GPIO20 (D+)
